password.title: Mi Fitness — Xiaomi Login
password.description: Enter your Xiaomi account credentials. If 2FA is enabled, a verification code will be sent to your email.

captcha.title: Mi Fitness — Captcha Required
captcha.description:
Enter the text shown in the image:

![Captcha]({captcha_url})

approval.title: Mi Fitness — Email Verification
approval.description:
Xiaomi sent a verification code to your email.

Enter the code below — the integration will submit it automatically.

tokens.title: Mi Fitness — Manual Token Entry
tokens.description:
Advanced: enter account credentials obtained from your own Mi Fitness session.

• ssecurity, userId, cUserId — from the serviceLoginAuth2 response
• passToken — from the serviceLoginAuth2 Set-Cookie header
• serviceToken — from the STS Set-Cookie header

passToken lets the integration auto-refresh tokens without 2FA. Highly recommended for 2FA accounts.

Region: {region}

reauth_confirm.title: Mi Fitness — Credentials Changed
reauth_confirm.description: Automatic re-login failed. Your password may have changed — enter updated credentials.

reauth_captcha.title: Mi Fitness — Captcha
reauth_captcha.description:
Enter the text shown in the image:

![Captcha]({captcha_url})

reauth_approval.title: Mi Fitness — Email Verification
reauth_approval.description:
Xiaomi sent a verification code to your email.

Enter the code below — the integration will submit it automatically.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Mi Fitness API. Check region and internet.
error.login_failed: Login failed. Check your credentials and try again.
error.unknown: Unexpected error — check Home Assistant logs.
error.approval_not_detected: Wrong or expired code. Check your email and try again.

abort.already_configured: This Mi Fitness account is already configured.
